sharedStateObservations.description: List command shows table of downloaded models with model ID, size, and file count
Remove command has --force flag to skip confirmation prompt
List command shows friendly message when cache is empty with download instructions
Remove command validates model exists before attempting deletion

reviewNotes: List and remove commands are well-implemented. List shows formatted table with model IDs, human-readable sizes, and file counts. Remove supports --force flag for non-interactive usage. Both commands handle empty cache gracefully with helpful messages. Size calculation recursively scans model directories.
